reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: If there's one strike against Peril of the Brutal Dark #5, it's that it's over far too quickly.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: Bizarro's fragile reality begins to crack apart as Jimmy Olsen and Perry White uncover mysteries lurking beneath one of DC's strangest worlds.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: Three stories that showcase Kara Zor-El's compassion, resilience, and enduring place in the DC Universe.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: A great example of what happens when you let a dynamite creative team loose on a longstanding character to tell good, old-fashioned mysteries.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: Absolute Wonder Woman has returned to the Wild Isle, but who kidnapped Circe?

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: New character dynamics and a foe that Oroku Saki can't easily defeat are introduced.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: Explores the corrupting influence of fame and how it shapes someone's identity as the horror series races toward its end.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: The Invincible Universe continues to expand in fresh new ways, and I can't wait to see what's next.

reason.label: AIPT review
reason.snippet: High-speed action, striking visuals, and a thought-provoking romance at the heart of its futuristic world.
